tagline: Used baby gear? Check the model once, buy with confidence.
hero_headline: Don't know if that model is recalled?
hero_sub: Check CPSC recalls, expiration dates, and federal compliance in seconds. Every model. Every time.
pains: Secondhand marketplaces are a mess. You don't know if a model is recalled—and buying something unsafe keeps you up at night.
Car seats and cribs expire. You don't know how much life is left in that used gear.
Federal safety standards change constantly. Old gear might not meet current rules—or be legal to resell.

features.title: Recall Lookup
features.desc: Instant CPSC data: see if your model is recalled and why

features.title: Resale Legality

how.desc: Type the product name and exact model number
See recalls, expiration status, and compliance instantly
Only pay if it's safe. Rest easy on purchase or resale.

proof: We've mapped CPSC recalls and federal standards across thousands of models. Early beta users get free lookups forever.
cta_sub: First 500 users get free unlimited searches forever. Data updates real-time.

faq.q: Where does the data come from?
faq.a: Official CPSC, FDA, and manufacturer databases—100% verified
Free for parents, forever. Resale shops and platforms have a paid tier.
Recalls and safety standards sync in real-time. Always the latest info.
